testcase.name: Admin dashboard shell › cost and analytics health pages render inside the admin shell

property.name: skip
property.value: Admin browser coverage requires TEST_ADMIN_EMAIL and TEST_ADMIN_PASSWORD.

testcase.name: Dashboard topbar interactions › search, user menu, and report problem dialog match the current shell
Dashboard topbar interactions › authenticated users can move between the current tenant entry routes
Dashboard shell navigation › integrations route exposes the current shell controls
Dashboard shell navigation › sidebar arrow-key navigation follows the live focus model
Admin dashboard shell › cost and analytics health pages render inside the admin shell

property.name: skip
property.value: Admin browser coverage requires TEST_ADMIN_EMAIL and TEST_ADMIN_PASSWORD.

testcase.name: Dashboard topbar interactions › search, user menu, and report problem dialog match the current shell

testcase.failure:
[webkit] › dashboard-navigation.spec.ts:3:3 › Dashboard topbar interactions › search, user menu, and report problem dialog match the current shell
